Comments for Quantum Martial Arts San Francisco https://quantumsf.org Nonprofit Martial Arts School in San Francisco's Mission District Fri, 22 Aug 2025 01:23:02 +0000 hourly 1 Comment on 30 Years of Service by Michael Shehane https://quantumsf.org/2025/08/19/30-years-of-service/comment-page-1/#comment-2173 Fri, 22 Aug 2025 01:23:02 +0000 https://quantumsf.org/?p=8195#comment-2173 Time is such a brain melt. Your sentence here, for example, “This means that the Quantum forms are older now than the oldest Taekwondo forms were to me when I attended Master Shin’s dojo in the early 80’s.” Melting…

]]> Comment on Sinking Roots by Irene Voisin https://quantumsf.org/2024/12/30/sinking-roots/comment-page-1/#comment-1276 Sat, 04 Jan 2025 18:36:54 +0000 https://quantumsf.org/?p=7959#comment-1276 Exactly what we need to hear and focus on as we take on the next year and beyond. Thank you Master Evans.

]]> Comment on Rolling with the Punches by Kevin Traynor https://quantumsf.org/2020/04/03/rolling-with-the-punches/comment-page-1/#comment-228 Thu, 30 Apr 2020 01:47:46 +0000 http://quantumsf.org/?p=4489#comment-228 This is a wonderful way of looking at our lives. I like the part about free will. I’ve been thinking a lot lately about free will. It seems to me that we don’t actually have free will until we’re free. We’re free when we are fully self-aware, then we have free will. Uncertainty is all around us, but when we are certain of who we are within ourselves the uncertainty all around us is simply not potential for anything to happen, and that’s a good thing.
